subject: Excel freezes when filtering large worksheet
description: Workbook ~50k rows; applying filter hangs Excel for minutes; user fears data loss.

ts_steps.title: Calculation mode
ts_steps.action: Formulas → Calculation Options — Manual temporarily; apply filter; recalculate once.

ts_steps.title: Table and formats
ts_steps.action: Convert range to Excel Table; remove excessive conditional formatting on entire columns.

ts_steps.title: 64-bit and repair
ts_steps.action: Confirm 64-bit Office; Online Repair from Apps & Features if corruption suspected.

internal_information: Volatile functions over big ranges, whole-column references, or graphics driver interaction. Power Query alternative for huge data.
